'''vozafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nuanced|nuanced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nuanced|nuanced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozafithi|vozafithi]] || [[word:vozafiji|vozafiji]] || [[word:vozafishi|vozafishi]] || [[word:vozafiki|vozafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozafuthuthu|vozafuthuthu]] || [[word:vozafujuju|vozafujuju]] || [[word:vozafushushu|vozafushushu]] || [[word:vozafukuku|vozafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozafuthu|vozafuthu]] || [[word:vozafuju|vozafuju]] || [[word:vozafushu|vozafushu]] || [[word:vozafuku|vozafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozafufthuf|vozafufthuf]] || [[word:vozafufjuf|vozafufjuf]] || [[word:vozafufshuf|vozafufshuf]] || [[word:vozafufkuf|vozafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozafethe|vozafethe]] || [[word:vozafeje|vozafeje]] || [[word:vozafeshe|vozafeshe]] || [[word:vozafeke|vozafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozafothotho|vozafothotho]] || [[word:vozafojojo|vozafojojo]] || [[word:vozafoshosho|vozafoshosho]] || [[word:vozafokoko|vozafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozafotho|vozafotho]] || [[word:vozafojo|vozafojo]] || [[word:vozafosho|vozafosho]] || [[word:vozafoko|vozafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozafofthof|vozafofthof]] || [[word:vozafofjof|vozafofjof]] || [[word:vozafofshof|vozafofshof]] || [[word:vozafofkof|vozafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfthÃŸf|vozafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfjÃŸf|vozafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfshÃŸf|vozafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfkÃŸf|vozafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vozafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vozafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vozafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vozafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfthÃŸf|vozafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfjÃŸf|vozafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfshÃŸf|vozafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfkÃŸf|vozafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfthÃŸf|vozafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfjÃŸf|vozafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfshÃŸf|vozafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozafÃŸfkÃŸf|vozafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozafÃḊthÃḊ|vozafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vozafÃḊjÃḊ|vozafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vozafÃḊshÃḊ|vozafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vozafÃḊkÃḊ|vozafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozafathatha|vozafathatha]] || [[word:vozafajaja|vozafajaja]] || [[word:vozafashasha|vozafashasha]] || [[word:vozafakaka|vozafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozafatha|vozafatha]] || [[word:vozafaja|vozafaja]] || [[word:vozafasha|vozafasha]] || [[word:vozafaka|vozafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozafafthaf|vozafafthaf]] || [[word:vozafafjaf|vozafafjaf]] || [[word:vozafafshaf|vozafafshaf]] || [[word:vozafafkaf|vozafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozafasha|vozafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozafshÃḋsha|vozafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozafrosha|vozafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozafmusha|vozafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozafyasha|vozafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozafnkshÃḋsha|govozafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozafnkrosha|govozafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozafnkmusha|govozafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozafnkyasha|govozafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozazafasha|vozazafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozazafshÃḋsha|vozazafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozazafrosha|vozazafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozazafmusha|vozazafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozazafyasha|vozazafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozazafnkshÃḋsha|govozazafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozazafnkrosha|govozazafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozazafnkmusha|govozazafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozazafnkyasha|govozazafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezÃḊfasha|vezÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezÃḊfshÃḋsha|vezÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezÃḊfrosha|vezÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezÃḊfmusha|vezÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezÃḊfyasha|vezÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|govezÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezÃḊfnkrosha|govezÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezÃḊfnkmusha|govezÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezÃḊfnkyasha|govezÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozfafasha|vozfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozfafshÃḋsha|vozfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozfafrosha|vozfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozfafmusha|vozfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozfafyasha|vozfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozfafnkshÃḋsha|govozfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozfafnkrosha|govozfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozfafnkmusha|govozfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozfafnkyasha|govozfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
